description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a metallic barrel with a ventilated rib and a wooden stock. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark, worn metal, while the fore-end and stock are made of polished wood, giving it a classic appearance. The shotgun has a visible tubular magazine beneath the barrel and a shell holder attached to the receiver, holding several shotgun shells. The trigger guard is elongated and features a brass knuckle-style design, providing both protection and grip. The pump handle is ribbed for better grip and is colored in a reddish-brown hue. The overall design suggests a robust, utilitarian firearm suitable for urban defense or law enforcement scenarios.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a ventilated ribbed barrel, wooden stock, and a brass knuckle-style trigger guard, featuring a shell holder and ribbed pump handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, ribbed pump handle, shell holder, and brass knuckle-style trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the pump handle and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the shell holder and trigger guard visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ventilated ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, brass knuckle-style trigger guard with multiple finger grooves
